name: kx-results
description: Result service for ICF Kayak Cross competitions — server with KX-Web publisher
_comment_dependencies: The skeleton intentionally has ZERO dependencies (node:http + node:sqlite).
Planned additions for the next development steps:
socket.io        — Gate Judge messaging (replaces the SSE stub in server.js)
better-sqlite3   — optional drop-in for node:sqlite (same API, see lib/db.js)
pdfkit or puppeteer — start list / result PDF printing
